findings.title: verseles/showdown
findings.description: Comprehensive LLM leaderboard aggregating multiple benchmarks into transparent rankings. Open data, community-driven, built with Svelte.

findings.title: JiaQiSJTU/UserCentricLeaderboard
findings.description: This project introduces a novel, user-centric leaderboard for Large Language Models (LLMs) that moves beyond one-size-fits-all evaluations. Our framework empowers users to create personalized rankings on subjective topics.

findings.title: wassname/llm_ethics_leaderboard
findings.description: Evaluate the moral and ethical values of language models. Using choice ranking in text based games.

findings.title: g4ix/advLab1-HITS
findings.description: Project for an advanced lab investigating LLM benchmarks from an IR perspective. Instead of focusing on model performance, we evaluated benchmark robustness, identifying which questions truly differentiate models and whether leaderboard rankings reflect real differences or are dominated by easy, high-hubness items.

findings.title: dickren123/llm-leaderboard
findings.description: Weekly updated ranking of the best large language models (LLMs)

findings.title: Venomn/llm-leaderboard-backend
findings.description: LLM leaderboard, ranking based on user reported issues

findings.title: Venomn/llm-leaderboard-frontend
findings.description: LLM leaderboard, ranking based on user reported issues

findings.title: ShadowPlayz1121/leaderboard-summarizer
findings.description: 📝 Summarize and analyze leaderboard data with ease using leaderboard-summarizer, a simple Python package for reliable, structured output.

findings.title: Hkshoonya/AI-Market-Place
findings.description: The public market graph for AI models — rankings, benchmarks, pricing, launches, provider momentum, and agent-native commerce
